title: Just the Tip
description: The tip of the minecraft modding iceberg!
body:
## Just the Tip is a Fabric Minecraft 1.20.1 Modpack that aims to have something for everyone! From exploration, automation and building it aims to have something to give everyone something to do!

As time goes on the project will get modified like adding or removing mods to make it playable on worse hardware.
The main aim of the modpack is to be a singleplayer and multiplayer friendly modpack that does not need high end hardware to run, also make it enjoyable for diffrent playstyles, but also make it enjoyable for everyone.

As the name suggests the modpack will have some of the mods from each category, to help the modpack not be too confusing and cluttered just some mods will remain from each category!

## Mods you can enjoy in this modpack

![YUNG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13d9970dd3b02cd3a4a8ef13072d77efd5ed6bc5.webp)
### YUNG's Better Mods
- **YUNG's Better Mineshafts - This mod completely revamps vanilla abandoned mineshafts, changing them from boring straight lines into dynamic, varied webs of tunnels.Find loot tucked away in the corners of abandoned workstations, or out in the open in a chest on a minecart.**

- **YUNG's Better Dungeons - A complete redesign of Minecraft's dungeons like never before. YUNG's Better Dungeons redesigns vanilla dungeons while also adding three new dungeons: Catacombs, Fortresses of the Undead, and Spider Caves!**

- **YUNG's Better Desert Temples - The ultimate upgrade to Minecraft's desert temples! YUNG's Better Desert Temples redesigns vanilla desert temples to be way more exciting, adding a variety of new puzzles, traps, & parkour challenges. And of course, you'll get much better loot than vanilla's desert temples for your troubles! By default, mining fatigue will be applied to all players in the Better Desert Temple. Once you clear the temple (i.e. kill the pharaoh at the end of the temple), the mining fatigue effect for that temple will be permanently lifted! You can disable this feature in the config. Additionally, you can re-enable vanilla desert temples to spawn alongside Better Desert Temples in the config.**

![Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8f3cc16edeca576fdf4fd578155d94f5b281172.webp)

### Farmer's Delight & Addons

Farmer's Delight is a mod that gently expands upon farming and cooking in Minecraft.

Using a collection of rustic tools and workstations, you can improve the foundation of your farm plots, prepare a myriad of hearty meals and snacks, and even gear up a bit better for adventure!

This mod focuses on giving more purpose to items often forgotten or overlooked by players (such as milk, mushrooms, beetroots etc). Hopefully this will encourage you to farm a little bit of everything!

![Create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e706894a63e3faec5f24df811b5e316ec31a2b4c.webp)

### Create & Addons

Create is a minecraft mod created by simibubi that allows you to make Contraptions and automate processes using Rotational Power. It adds many mechanical components and block variants to the game. This mod has good optimization and FPS, so it can be played on nearly any computer!
